name: Entropy Reactor
description: Notes Obtained by combining a Loaded Core and a Locked Reactor by dragging them on top of each other (or via a quest at The Tinkerer). The item will drop in an orange bag on the ground when the two aforementioned items are combined.
effects: No stat bonuses unless worn as part of set
Effect: Restores 150 HP when taking damage when below 300 HP Cooldown: 60 seconds On Taking Damage: 5% chance to trigger one of the Alien Cores effects Cooldown: 15 seconds
